ORAG benchmark operations fixture.

The controlled Benchmark Pack uses a high_precision profile with Top-K 8.
Every Benchmark Run records the verified Manifest SHA-256, the server runtime
environment SHA-256, and a non-secret immutable build revision. These values
must match between a completed P0 parent and a P1 through P8 candidate.

The public API listens on port 8080. Private Pack objects are checksum-verified
before indexing. The evaluator uses the frozen benchmark dataset only; it does
not read credentials, signed URLs, or external public benchmark objects.

P0 packs at most 5 evidence chunks in 6000 deterministic text units. P8 reuses
the compatible P0 index and packs at most 3 evidence chunks with the same 6000
text-unit limit. The comparison is an audit of recorded measurements and does
not claim quality, cost, or latency improvements.
